---
title: 'The Home of WFC'
date: '2014-04-20T19:48:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Conceptions'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '774275136694616188'
blogger_filename: '/p/the.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Conceptions/feed.atom'
---

<h3 style="text-align: center;">
Wolfe Family Conceptions</h3>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/conceptions-logo-trial-one-de03adfbc136.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/conceptions-logo-trial-one-de03adfbc136.jpg" height="300" width="400" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
Wolfe Family Conceptions
<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
CONCEPts + CreaTIONS = Conceptions</blockquote>
<br />
Our Mission:<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Creating with the Creator!</blockquote>
<br />
Our Vision:<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
To use all of the gifts, talents, and treasures we have to fulfill Godâ€™s call on our life and help others fulfill their call. Therefore we reach out in art, writing, music, and other business ventures to help people get closer to God, see their full potential, fulfill their destiny, and reach their destination. In essence we create with the creator in order to draw all people to Him!
</blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
